description: Analysis with design problems of electronic communications circuits. Emphasis on the nonlinear effects of large-signal operation of active devices. Complete design of r.f. oscillator, amplifier, and mixer circuits.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: E C E 340and420, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
